raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I received an email confirmation for an XXXX XXXX XXXX purchase placed for pickup at the Best Buy XXXX XXXX in XXXX, FL. I did not place this order. Immediately upon receiving the notice, I contacted the store and your customer service department to prevent the pickup. Unfortunately, despite my repeated requests for urgent intervention, no action was taken to stop the fraud. The computer was released, and the charge was posted to my Best Buy credit card. 

Since then, I have filed XXXX fraud claims ( Case # XXXX and XXXX # XXXX ) with their partner Citibank. Both were denied, despite clear evidence that the transaction was unauthorized. I have repeatedly asked your representatives to review store security footage and verify identification used at pickup, as your own process requires ID to release merchandise. To date, no one has addressed these requests. 

During this time, I also discovered that my Best Buy online account had been compromised, with an unauthorized email address added. Removing it took weeks of effort, including multiple calls, escalations, and eventually assistance at a store. This is clear evidence of account takeover fraud. 

Adding to my frustration, I have been a loyal Best Buy customer. In the past XXXX XXXX  alone, I have purchased XXXX appliances for my own home and family membersover {$8000.00} in purchases in XX/XX/year> alone. My credit history is impeccable, with a score over XXXX. It is unreasonable to suggest that I would risk my reputation and financial standing over a fraudulent {$1000.00} computer purchase. 

Despite this, I have now received XXXX denial letters, the most recent dated XX/XX/year>. Each time, I have had to re-explain the situation from the beginning, with no resolution. At XXXX point, I was even advised to file a police reportwhich I have since doneyet the fraudulent charge remains on my account, and payment is being demanded by XX/XX/year>. 

I also contacted the Best Buy CEO and received the same denial from their team and they stated they will not respond to any other inquiries and they recommended that I continue to work with Citibank. They both blame each other for the denial. 

The credit card bill was due on XX/XX/year>, and I didn't pay it because I didn't incur the charge. I am concerned about protecting my credit and this charge must be removed together with any interest and late fees.
